reviews.review_text: Great location close to beaches and restaurants, shops, good price and clean comfortable accommodation. Friendly staff and an easy weekend. Thank you

What a great park. Great location, close to beach, cafes, shops and dog friendly. Great area for walking dogs around the lake and on the beach. Most cafes allowed dogs outside
Nice and quiet location with excellent sized caravan sites.
The amenities were modern, spotlessly clean and the showers had great water pressure.
The staff were very friendly and helpful.
We will be back again....... thank you
We stayed in a cabin nicely set out and great place to stay

Disappointing any negative reviews are basic, generic replies without an offer of a ph discussion to offer any remedy or discount from staff.

Appliances that failed to work.or faulty. Didnt cater for bedside lamp in 2nd bedrm!! Deal breaker

Great destination.Yes very clean rooms. Manicured gdns. Close transport & cafes, surf club.. Beach close.

Not enough ammenities within the grounds. No assistance when asked. Screaming kids at 5am, young teenagers roaming at night yelling out.
Nice cabins, very clean and comfortable. Ideal location, walking distance to beach . Really friendly and helpful staff. Will definitely be back.
Absolutely amazing Willa,nice and clean,beautiful smile people at reception, Love it all
We had wonderful experience with amazing staff who welcomed us with smiles , very quiet , peaceful and beautiful family and friendly atmosphere ❤️
had an amazing stay have booked allready for the same time next year

Had a wonderful stay and will be back again.
Bruce at reception was super helpful,friendly and his customer service - above and beyond to help organise for us to stay another day.
Highly recommend to stay here.

I don’t really want to give great reviews on this place, cuz everyone will come and I won’t get a site, when I want to come. Please come up when I’m not, as you will have a great time, the staff and amenities are awesome.
I just love it here. You will too

First time staying here, staff were very friendly, and accommodating for us, stayed as a group on caravan sites and they were perfect for us. So happy we rebooked for next Easter! Amenities were clean and tidy secure at night,. Loved the pool and playground. Easily walking distance to the beach, cafe, restaurants, pub, surf club, convenience store. We all Loved it!
Fabulous, immaculate, private sites and the staff are lovely
Sehr gepflegter Park mit schönen Palmen & Pflanzen. Die Stellplätze und die Wege ebenfalls gut befahrbar. Das Ensuit sehr schön ausgestattet & sauber. Das Personal am Empfang auch sehr freundlich.

Sitting in the pool on a hot day is wonderful.
Rooms in the cabins are very clean and well presented.
Great location. Clean and cosy cabins

Stayed here for a week while I went to a family members wedding, it was fantastic :) I will definitely come again, well priced, good quality, lovely little village vibe and close to the beach. Thankyou

Have been going to Alex Beach c/p for years. Love it. Close to everything. Disappointed this year with the garden maintenance. They used to be on top of mowing and edge trimming but this year we didn't see anyone around our site for the whole 5 weeks. Embarrassing when we had visitors. Rain wasn't the problem. We had great weather.
Stunning area with lovely hosts. Everything is presented to such a high standard. I thoroughly enjoyed my time here. It's also in an excellent location!

Had an en-suite powered caravan site.|Small. En-suite good if u were a midget. Not enough room to swing a cat.|No door on shower just small glass wall.|Water went out opening onto other floor and toilet.|Leak in wall from outside..|Had to shower in the corner to stop water.|I had to buy mats. Won’t be going back. Rated 2 out of 10

Booked power site with en-suite.
Ensuite had a leak. No door on shower. Water went all into where toilet was. Extremely small en-suite. Shower toilet hand basin.
I had to buy rubber mats so water would not go outside opening. Short shower wall.
Small sites.
Expensive.
1 star for toilet and 1 for shower
Won’t be going back

Beautiful location and very central.  Stayed in a cabin. Was nice but no fresh towels for the entire stay. Door didn't lock properly and fridge didn't work. Was a bit frustrating...price was good. Little noisy at night with kids running around but guess that's typical for a caravan park. Just be prepared for that.

We have just spent 7 delightful days here! Stay 7 nights, pay for 6, is a good deal! It's a great location that is central to everything on the Sunshine Coast. Being setback from the main roads it is nice and quiet. Caravan sites are easy to get into, with a hedge of shrubs between most sites. Toilet facilities are central and are kept immaculately clean. A slightly heated pool is nice to cool down in after a morning or afternoon walk through the expansive surrounds, which includes parklands and an amazing coastal walkway? Check-in was easy with knowledgeable and friendly staff. There is a coffee van near the entrance most mornings and a pizza van every Wednesday and Saturday evenings from 4:30pm. I highly recommend this park for a stopover or an extended break!

We stayed at Alex Beach Cabin for two nights and two days we enjoyed so tidy  clean we loved it near to the beach walking distance I can say everything is close and easily accessible. We have been years ago in this Cabin so amazing good value for. Holiday makers. We recommend to stay in this tourist park.
Excellent value for money! Comfortable rooms, great facilities, and fantastic service — worth every penny.

Like always and since more than 10 years, Alex Beach Cabins is our favourite place to be on the coast. Clean, perfect size cabins, lovely staff und perfectly located in 3 minutes walking distance to the beautiful Alex beach, Shops, bakery and so much more. Thank you very much to Les and his great staff !
AWESOME Spot with location short drive to Maroochydore Shopping Centre a 5-10 minute walk to the Beach and Restaurants what more do you need 😁
Immaculately presented caravan park. Super friendly. Cabins were perfect for a getaway with the family.
Great spot, fantastic place to stay with the family
Great place to take your caravan or book a cabin. Family friendly a short stroll to the beach. Close to great restaurants and cafes.
Great caravan park, good cabins too

The sites at Alex Beach Cabins and Tourist Park are great with plenty of room to move around and open all windows on your caravan without having to worry someone might drive into them. It was great to be able to hear the waves at night giving us a great nights sleep.
It's fabulous!

Reception team were outstanding. Friendly l, informative and approachable. Walking distance to patrolled beach, restaurants and huge shopping centre. Cabin cleanliness was excellent.  Grounds were immaculate.  Facilities were excellent and clean. Highly recommended.  Will definitely be back.
Loved our 1 week stay here, travelled from Adelaide ,the staff were wonderful and friendly our cabin was very clean, comfortable bed, the pool was great...will stay here again

We went with a Holiday Mooloolaba rental and we were very pleased.  The staff were pleasant and helpful and the accomodation was just as described.
Perfect views of the ocean and easy access to the beach.
We recommend Holiday Mooloolaba for your next sojourn.
Malcolm and Janet.

Beautiful apartment right in front of the beach. Once here you don’t have to drive anywhere 7 minute walk to Mooloolaba cafes and shops and 5 minute walk to the spit and the fresh seafood shops. We definitely recommend especially to families with young kids. We will be back 💯
Easy booking system and great value rates. Clean and tidy rooms with no issues. We look forward to our next stay with Holiday Mooloolaba!
The accommodation was excellent, exactly like listing. Everything was as expected!

Don't bother. Rented apartment 203 Oceans for 7 nights at Mooloolaba as advertised as 5-star resort.  Was 3-star or less. Apartment not cleaned on arrival. Main appliances not working. Washing machine had to be replaced. Induction cooktop not working properly whole 7 nights. BBQ filthy and unable to be used. Had to eat out 6 of 7 nights (one night cooked in set off fire alarms due to smoke from kitchen). 'Two nights of toiletries comprised a one square inch of soap each. No body wash, hair shampoo or conditioner and no hair dryer. Had to drive/uber to Holiday Mooloolaba to pick up and drop off key.  No allowance given for travel to and fro to do that. I had to pay Uber extra $30 to do on departure. Apartment was nice in living area and great to access pool from balcony, although steps into and out of pool very high and not accessibility friendly. I would not stay there agsin.
Friendly and very easy to deal with
Great holiday house and clear communication

5 people stayed for 2 nights at Taranaki 2- Ground Floor, Mooloolaba Beach Apartment for Strummingbird Festival.
Upon collecting the keys from office, I was informed that the garage remote probably won't work?? Maybe fix it then instead of inconveniencing guests. Walk into unit, turn the whole place upside down, not a single towel for 5 guests, tried to call office, no answer. We then had to go and purchase our own towels, absolutely not acceptable. When office advised of this upon check out, they didn't care whatsoever, nor did they offer any form of compensation for this. Cleanliness also leaves a lot to be desired, would not recommend and I am being very generous providing a 3 star.
Great stay here in Mooloolaba! Beautiful process and experience here.
Simple and great experience!
A great view for short stay
Amazing service by the ladies at Holiday Mooloolaba and an awesome location of a room at the Bilgola. Would 10:10 stay here again!!
Great service from Holiday Mooloolaba !  Super helpful with check in and out.  We had a fabulous stay in Breeze apartment!  Will use again!
We loved staying with holiday Mooloolaba at Alex beach resort. The facilities are amazing and staff very friendly. Quiet rooms and everything we needed
Very helpful staff, easy access to accomodation for big group, clean apartment. Would definitely come back!

Great service from the team. Had an issue with our room and they immediately upgraded us to a lovely apartment with a beach view. Would recommend if there is a problem to contact them straight away so they can put things in motion. So much better and easier than using booking sites. Highly recommend.
Easy checkin and helpful with misplaced keys. Very friendly service
Fantastic location, clean and had all the amenities I needed.
We booked through air bnb, the staff were very helpful and lovely. The property was just as pictured and great location.

We got the worst possible location for a powered tent site that shouldn’t even be located where it is, right next to where it’s exposed to upto 50kmph high gusts of wind came in and destroyed one of our tent’s pole locking mechanism resulting in a collapsed tent and yes our pegs remained in and we didn’t set it up wrongly, we had to tie our poles to the wooden fence for stability. All other tent sites are covered by trees and other caravans and tents there seemed to get less than 25% of the wind current we did, the site we were given should be a caravan site not tent! Very disappointing and poor organisation of land management.

Edit: Yes we DID bring this to office’s attention and they’ve said groundsmen will come at our site in an hour and they’ve only ended up calling us which we had trouble hearing them over the phone so we went to the office and upon getting there we’re told “there’s no groundsmen on today and unfortunately there’s nothing we can do about it, you could go to Bunnings to buy anything to help” so no there’s nothing they did “their best to help” as you’ve mentioned. I write this review in hopes to help you better people’s stay and experience because that ruined ours, better your site management.

Very expensive for what you get. Unfortunately in an empty park we got put next to permanent residents who are smokers. I didn’t pay that much for my caravan to smell like cigarettes and have to leave my windows closed. Also lots of people along the back fence near the road when other sites are available and would have significantly less traffic noise.
Very overpriced. Facilities minimal for the number of site’s , receptionist didn’t even know where Surf Club was . (400 metres away )
This place was bitterly disappointing. $80 per night the park is run down and the amenities were disgusting. I’m so glad I only booked for two nights and not a week like I had originally planned.

Love staying here in our caravan
So close to the beach

Not happy at all with our stay if u have kids this is not recommended as there’s nothing kid friendly or anything for kids to do except walk to the beach also all the bathrooms have a key code that u have to remember witch is quite annoying if ur in a rush .sites are also EXTREAMLY tight and squishy over all would never ever recommend this park to anyone 0/10 was shit!🤮🤮
Great cleanliness and well kept grounds. Amazing place to stay.
Book the camping site here, the place just next to the beach. The staff was nice and would love to comeback here next time :)
Great place, but has got too expensive for pensioner's. The Sunshine Coast Council has got very greedy with it caravan park fees.
NOT worth 80$ per night! Really Bad facilities and Poor maintenance

We stopped here for two nights on our journey home to Cairns. The park is walking distance to beaches, restaurants and shopping. It was neat and tidy and quiet at night. Reception staff were friendly at check in. We plan to revisit and stay for a week to experience all it has to offer. Only downside for us was it was difficult to find a shower that had hot water - it was a little hit and miss and speaking with other guests it was clear they had the same trouble.
The park is nice . The park entrance has now been closed all day , no cars or caravans in or out . No notification given to us ? Very poor management that stuffed up our holiday plans today .

My wife and I recently spent four weeks at the Maroochydore Beach Holiday Park and enjoyed every minute of our stay. The amenities and facilities are excellent and very well cared for by the hard working staff. Our site was on the beach side of the park and we were literally on the beach through an access gate in 1 minute. The park is very well located and easy walk to Cotton Tree and many cafes and restaurants in the immediate area. Mooloolaba is a comfortable 3.5km walk away and if necessary a bus stop is right outside the park. Reception staff are extremely helpful and friendly which leaves a very good impression on guests. We have already booked a stay for 2026 and can’t wait to get back!
Was a great park , the manager was wonderful and very helpful when we had sone other person park in our cabin car park ,would stay here again
I have stayed here a few times and always clean and tidy with friendly staff. The location is also great
So fresh clean welcoming staff
A really nice place to stay close to beach and great walking tracks.

The pictures made it look much bigger than the cabin was and u could hear people on other cabins walking around. Was still a nice place to stay.. the arcade room was a let down. They need a pinball machine or something.
Great location, reasonable price, nice quiet spot steps from beautiful Alex Beach!

0/10 - Booked 2 nights, rooms were filthy, with holes everywhere that allowed bugs inside. Flyscreens werent even secured. We were eaten alive by mosquito's all night. Uncomfortable beds, amenities were disgusting, we cancelled the 2nd night and they refused to refund our money. Wifi never worked. Rooms were filthy.

We will be lodging a complaint with fair trading qld.

This is a great place for short stays, instead of a hotel or motel. Extremely quiet and peaceful overnight, lovely bed linen and towels, comfy bed, lots of space and the convenience of a well-appointed kitchen. I especially appreciated the covered carport right next to our 2br cabin during a recent stay. My 6-month-old car stayed safe when a huge storm broke, complete with hail and fierce wind.

We have stayed at Alex Beach 2 times recently, both times we have totally enjoyed the facilities , friendly staff and great location , a short walk to the beach and shops.
Definitely will be revisiting this Holiday Park.
Central to shopping centres. Excellent meals at Maroochydore and Mooloolaba Surf clubs. Alex beach cabins superb staff and excellent accommodation.
Stayed at a powered site for 4 nights a week or so ago. Great location, park was extremely clean and tidy, and staff were all fantastic. Wish we had longer there…!

I was so impressed with Alex Beach Cabins & Tourist Park!
The service was exceptional. The cabin was so clean & well presented. The location was great.
The cute coffee van out the front served amazing coffee. 100% recommend!

Loved this caravan park. It’s clean and tidy. Easy walk to beach. Short drive to large shopping plaza. Smack in the middle of Maroochydore and Mooloolaba.  My daughter and family stayed in the cabin and it was very spacious and clean.

Great powered site with hedges between our site to provide privacy. Each with our own bin. Great customer service with plenty of information about what to do around the area. Great location walking distance to beach, shops & restaurants.

My wife and I recently spent four weeks at the Maroochydore Beach Holiday Park and enjoyed every minute of our stay. The amenities and facilities are excellent and very well cared for by the hard working staff. Our site was on the beach side of the park and we were literally on the beach through an access gate in 1 minute. The park is very well located and easy walk to Cotton Tree and many cafes and restaurants in the immediate area. Mooloolaba is a comfortable 3.5km walk away and if necessary a bus stop is right outside the park. Reception staff are extremely helpful and friendly which leaves a very good impression on guests. We have already booked a stay for 2026 and can’t wait to get back!

You’ll get better value at Big 4 Maroochy or Ingenia Rivershore and still be well located in Maroochy & and near the beach. If the customer service here was great that could improve the overall experience, but even regular return guests warn this place is a cemetery with staff reluctantly coming and going from other caravan parks, just to keep the wheels turning. Another total bust.
Nice place to stay but as other Sunshine Coast caravan parks own by Council is very expensive compared to other.

We were very disappointed with the cabin, it stunk of toilet and was infested with cockroaches and ants. The beds were uncomfortable. The cabins are located next to the road and the traffic noise is so loud that it was like sleeping next to a drag strip. We had to go up the street to the laundry mat to wash our clothes as the machines at the park don’t accept coins or credit cards, you had to download an app on your phone, we found this inconvenient. On a positive, it was in close proximity to the beach tho which was lovely.

Called to cancel a booking 3 weeks before the date. I made the booking over the phone without looking at the website. When I called to book, I asked about cancellation, and the employee said that as long as you cancel a week before you will receive a full refund.
Upon calling to cancel, I was told that I would be billed a $50 cancellation fee. I explained my circumstances and what I was told over the phone when I booked, and the lady bluntly said that there is nothing they can do. Will not be returning or recommending after the unhelpful and rude customer service.

Nice clean park. Very friendly reception ladies. Good location.|Sites are spacious and easy to get onto. Great beach walk to the Surf clubs !!|We didn’t put away the esky and kids took some wine, our fault, so make sure you lock everything up!!

Great park only issue was travelling with a group of three vans they said we couldn't be next to each other but park mostly empty so could not see why we couldn't be next to each other not many van coming in and out. Close to shops and beach frontage
Stay away, don’t waste your time, stayed 1 night and now I’m trapped.
Tidy van park, clean amenities, some shaded spots but mostly open air. I was in a motor home.

What a well presented park.
The facilities were extra ordinarily clean at all times.
Ground maintenance was carried out every day. The result was a very clean and tidy park.
The staff and management were excellent.
Happy to recommend this venue and will deffently stay there again.
Great caravan park, lovely big sites.  Clean amenities.  Easy access to the beach.
Great spot to camp
Great caravan park right on the beach. Will stay again

We have stayed in three of the council owned parks, Mudjimba, Cotton Tree and our last experience Maroochydore. This council could learn alot from council run parks in Gold Coast and Hervey bay. I cannot speak about the rest of the other sites run by this council, apart from a poor experience booking into Dicky Beach. The reception we received by a male person behind the counter was nothing short of arrogant. After booking a site which was not a pleasant experience, we walked around that park to have a look at state of and facilities and cancelled our booking losing our deposit which was okay. Would not want to stay there. Out of the three parks we did stay at, Mudjimba was well managed. Cotton Tree only just and Maroochydore a failure. We stayed 13 nights there and in that time the amenities were not cleaned on Four occasions the last of that lot was two days in a row. The mens toilets apart from two cubicles had completely run out of toilet paper. The showers a disgusting mess. A complaint was made to the receptionist, who apologised  and stated they were having trouble getting cleaners.|In the end i noticed it was the receptionist that made the effort to clean leaving the office locked and unattended. Old park, need a major upgrade.

Had a four day stay in our Caravan, grounds were neat and tidy amenities always clean. Great location, close to beach and restaurants. Maroochydore Surf Lifeasaving Club just up the road and it is a patrolled beach, highly recommend for a stay.

Expensive for what you get. Facilities are fairly poor and dirty. We stayed for 1 night in a powered camp site, the light didn't work outside our site. The only redeeming quality is it's close to the beach. It could really do with an updated kitchen as there's 2 hot plates and a set of very dirty hobs.

beautiful park .but on the wednesday night a ambulance was needed for me ,my husbane can not use a mobile phone I was incapable of using mine when he went to the office area and used the phone there it rings someone there and whoever answered did not even want to talk to him let alone help.Luckly a lady in the cabin next door came to his rescue and came across to help me and rang ambulance So far no one from that park has even enquiried if i am okay .For a park of that size not to have after hours help if needed is realy bad .Do they just let someone die and leave them until some help is avalible wont be back there again they need to have some sort of after hour service thank good for the people in the cabin next door were there to help i spent 3 days in hospital
Good place to stay.  Central to everything you need.

We thoroughly enjoyed our stay. We had a camp site for our camper trailer right on the tree line next other the beach. The size of the camp site was plenty for our camper trailer and 4WD. Bathroom facilities and camp kitchen were clean and modern. Check in was easy and the lady was very friendly. Highly recommend this Holdiay Park.

I had booked for the 28th November & due to unforeseen personal circumstances had to cancel my booking. I rang & cancelled 31days prior & was told that there was a cancellation fee which was the $50 I had paid. THIS IS DISGUSTING! If I had only given a week or two notice I’d understand a certain % being kept but this park is a prime location park & they never have any issues filling vacancies especially at this time of year. Even giving them a 1 is too much. They should be ashamed of themselves especially since pensioners are doing it tough enough.
Nice central vanpark.
I've been here before. Good van sites, great amenities, and right on the beach. This trip was interrupted by a noisy construction site nearby  but can not blame the van park.
I’ve been here for two nights in a camper van. The spot we had was next to a busy road, could not sleep for the whole night.
Very clean facilities
$68.5 unpowered site pretty expensive and $5 extra for dog, when they don't need to do anything. But there's private access to the beach

Great spot. Not far from shops  restaurant and right on the beach.
The park and beach are
dog friendly but park and beach on lead.
The only thing is that we had dark sand under our van. As the dog likes to get under the van.  Othere then that, great park.
Prime real estate, get in and have a go before the land is sold.

Awesome park, set in a prime location. Very well appointed and safe. With Security Guards patrolling through the night.
Full of friendly people and good vibes.
A little expensive for what it is, we paid 71 aud for a powered site for only one night. The location is nice, is next to the beach but going back I would probably consider going to another place

For any families travelling with kids who don't want to inhale bucketloads of cigarette smoke, beware - smoking may be prohibited in common areas of the park but no issue with it at powered sites. Chain smokers next to us destroyed our experience. Had to keep the van constantly closed up to stop all of the smoke coming in where a kid with respiratory issues was trying to enjoy his holiday. Not impressed at all and probably won't be back.
Warm welcome, well maintained, loads of space, spotless amenities & terrific location right on the beach, close to everything.

We had a lovely time , stayed 7 nights, location right near the beach ⛱ toilets and showers 🚿 very clean, not meetered ,only thing the sites are a bit tight , very quiet at night and day ,easy walking distance to shops, plenty of places to eat and drink 🍸 we had a lovely time and rest 😀

Great place  but management is not so nice unless you are a a upper class person or type of gest the big boss is quick to kick you out and pride himself on the fact that he can kick you out at 3am and laugh about it later and tell you don't bother to to try getting  in any other parks because they own them all especially if you don't fit a a type of person
We had a powered camp site and was very pleased with this park. Fantastic location, right by the beach with private access! Clean shower rooms, good facilities. A very beautiful park

The map of the beach east of the park does not show the ugly dangerous sandbag groins. Unfortunately, the beach has had its beauty and amenity destroyed by the installation of unfit for purpose groins made of unsuitable, unstable, plastic material which is slowly leaching into the ocean. The material used was never designed to be exposed to the elements.

Great little park, right on the beach, plenty of food and other shopping facilities nearby. Amenities block very good. Very little for children, which makes it great for oldies, lol. Very full at present, so there is a need to book in advance. We were on a van site.
Great location and the facilities are very well maintained.

Great spot right near the beach with private access. Running Starlink here was easy. We setup with a Rooftop tent.

Staff are very friendly and helpful.

Amenities are nice and clean, plenty of showers.

20 minute walk from the Plaza.
Great sized sites. Clean and tidy. Amenities block are great.

We came in with our 12.5m motorhome so were self sufficient. Used the showers which were clean and nice n hot. Park was well kept. Staff were just beautiful and friendly. Great location. Had e-bikes so easy to get to shops and down to Mooloolaba. Other people in the park were friendly too. Easy access to beach. Paradise.  🏝️  Dump point was a bit tight (our fault not the parks) but we made it.

We enjoyed our stay here. The rooms weren't perfect condition, but they were clean and the amenities were fine. The location was good, with an acceptable price, and a nice pool and bbq area. Despite the pool heater being broken when we visited (they said it'd be fixed asap though), we still enjoyed the pool. There was also a coffee van on-site every morning which had nice coffee and muffins. We would stay here again.
Best caravan slabs we've ever been on. Beautiful area with plenty of walking distance to beach and shops.

Recently stayed here for the 3rd time over the past 3 years
Staff are friendly, the self contained villas are excellent and the location is beautiful
Situated in a great spot for whale watching , great sunrise and sunset photos and a stones throw to the beach.
Lots to see and do
Highly recommend and will be visiting again in 2026
Great place for an unwind. Always a pleasant stay, cabins & amenities are first class. Staff are very friendly & helpful. Only problem is you’ll not want to leave!!

this park is a hidden gem. Everything about the park clearly showed the pride the management and staff must have for the place. Amenities were spotless, grounds extremely tidy and well organised and the staff super friendly. As good a park as we've ever encountered.
Charmaine is an absolute amazing employee!! Very understanding and flexible and I appreciate the service I have got from her.
VERY FRIENDLY  AND HELPFULL STAFF, CLEAN PARK WOULD HIGHLY  RECOMMEND  THIS PARK

Our second stay at Alex Beach Cabins and Tourist Park. We booked a slightly larger cabin. The cabin itself was faultless. So clean, tidy & well equipped. The beds were very comfortable. Having The Alex Pantry within walking distance was also very helpful when we needed anything. A very well thought out tourist park.

We had a site for our motorhome. The staff were super helpful and great to deal with. Charmaine went above and beyond to help us. The grounds are well kept and lovely. The pool is amazing. The local birds are friendly and the location is great. You could walk to everything. Will def be staying there again on our next trip.
I enjoyed staying at Alex Beach Cabins and Tourist Park with my little family. Great facilities. Awesome location, central to shops, parks, restaurants and the beach. Highly recommend staying here.

We  had a caravan site for 3 weeks, & it wasn't long enough.  Quiet, & well located. The Alex Surf Club not far to walk to. Staff were friendly and helpful.  Amenities very clean. We enjoyed walking  around the adjoining lake.
Lugar limpio ordenado y con buena localización. El personal muy atencioso y amable. El precio muy bien para la calidad que ofrecen. Lo recomiendo!

とても静かで、ピースフルな場所でした。
早めに着いてしまったのにも関わらず、チェックインさせてもらいました。ありがとう。
敷地、部屋全ての場所がとても綺麗で清潔です。スタッフの方々の日々の仕事が素晴らしい事が伝わってきました。
Lovely place to surf. Lovely place to eat & drink at the Surf Club
This is a great space between two very busy beaches. The caravan park is walking distance to a great beach and cafes. The cabin was fresh and clean. The pool was refreshing. This is an oasis.
Fabulous!

The cabins are spacious, very clean and the kitchen is well equipped, the staff are friendly and helpful, very convenient location , very reasonable prices. A quiet peaceful safe setting. We stay there whenever we visit the Sunshine Coast and every time is the same 10 out of 10. Another visit and nothings changed still 10 out of 10.

The park is situated beside a pet friendly walk around lake full of bird life and the Service was very friendly and you were made to feel welcome. The caravan site had good access and the site was clean with each one having their own bins which were emptied every morning .
Overall the hole experience was excellent I would highly recommend this caravan park
Beautiful stay ! Gorgeous views and location, great apartment. Will be back :))
Great holiday service, property was in great condition and pick up and drop off of keys was very easy from the wharf
Great location. Roomy and a light apartment. Great beds. Would stay again
The team were terrific, check in was super efficient and they made our stay incredibly easy
loved our stay in Windarra. complete amenities. very nice & tidy room. great for groups!

We recently stayed in Bilgola Apt 4, a modest and older property that has an unbeatable location, directly across from the beach, between Mooloolaba and Alexandra Headland.

Although the complex looks weary and dated from the outside, the apartment itself has been nicely refurbished. It was fresh, light, clean and tidy. The balcony provides an amazing panoramic view, the living and kitchen areas are well stocked and provide all that you need. There are two bedrooms, one with a queen and the other with two singles. We travelled as a couple, but obviously suitable for families as well. The bathroom is large, although I will mention there's a high ledge to step over for shower access. This could be difficult for young children, the elderly, or the incapacitated.

One issue that did impact my stay was the road noise. It can be quite intrusive, so you adjust to it during the day, but it can be challenging throughout the night and early morning. Par for the course and the price to pay for being right beside the beach, but still noteworthy.

The reason behind my 3 star review is the customer service behind the scenes. I dealt with multiple people before and after my stay and, although friendly and professional, they were generally inflexible or inconsistent with their information/advice.

As my wife had a Brisbane specialist's appointment the day of our departure, I requested a late checkout on those grounds but was declined. I asked for one hour (11am) to better align departure time and appointment time, but was again declined. The reason? A booking for that same day so cleaning needed to be completed. As someone whose entire family is in Hospitality/Accommodation, including a wife who oversees a large 75+ room Gold Coast business, we felt that flexibility was definitely an option. My wife makes allowances on a daily basis to meet customer requests/satisfaction, so this blunt and non-negotiable response was disappointing.

Additionally, when I check out on a Friday morning, I would expect my $200 safety deposit back soon after. To receive it 7 days later, after enduring mixed messages about clearance times through to the bank being responsible, is completely unacceptable. It finally cleared yesterday, the day after I made several calls. Possibly coincidence, maybe not.

Overall, we enjoyed our stay and the apartment was excellent value for money. If anything, I appeal to the Holiday Mooloolaba staff to re-evaluate their customer service practices. Not everything is black and white, and small improvements can offer great rewards.

Alex Beach Cabins and Tourist Park is a fantastic spot for a getaway! The cabins are beautiful and available for people who prefer a cozy stay, but the park also welcomes caravans which include your own toilet & shower, making it a versatile option. Everything about the place feels thoughtfully put together, from the tidy grounds to the amazing staff who clearly take pride in keeping it all immaculate.

The amenities are top-notch. There’s a well-equipped camp kitchen for those who like to cook their meals, and the pool setup is a highlight – two pools, with one being a larger pool linked to another, creating a stunning centerpiece. It’s child-friendly too, with a playground for the little ones to enjoy.

The park is affordable and offers great value for money. However, I didn’t notice any pets onsite, so it might not be pet-friendly. All in all, it’s a wonderful, relaxing place to stay, perfect for families or anyone looking for a clean, well-maintained, and affordable holiday destination.

The room was clean, and the bed was very comfy.
The shower had amazing water pressure, and the temperature was consistent. The bathroom is smaller than on the last cruiseship I went on, but it does the job.
The heater is loud and it made me jump everytime it turned on. I put the extra blanket on the bed and turned it off before going to sleep.
The cabins and vans were packed in close and the small children on scooters, bikes, and running around unsupervised did worry me with all the large vehicles in the area. I thought it was going to be a bit noisy but after about 9pm, everything went quiet and I slept better than I had in weeks!
The bed was comfortable, even the pillows were good.

You can easily walk to the beach. There's plenty of places to eat nearby. They have a coffee van onsite for a morning coffee and toastie. There was a greek food van visiting the night I was there too. I had received an email to say this was happening before my stay, which I thought was really good.
I'd have no issue with staying again.

Una delle più belle spiagge del mondo. Quello che mi è piaciuto maggiormente sono tutti i servizi che vengono offerti gratuitamente ai turisti: bagni, docce, fontanelle, panchine. Il lungomare è lunghissimo. Abbiamo fatto 10 km a piedi camminando per i sentieri lastricati e accessibili. Mi è piaciuta anche la frequente segnaletica. Ogni accesso al mare è numerato in modo da essere facilmente raggiungibile dalle ambulanze in caso di emergenza.
Un altro aspetto che ho molto apprezzato è che si prendono cura della vegetazione che infatti è rigogliosa e magnifica.
Inoltre le spiagge ogni due anni vengono sottoposte a lavori di manutenzione per evitare l'erosione. Per non privare completamente i turisti della spiaggia, i lavori vengono effettuati a turno. Cioè ogni volta sottopongono alla manutenzione un piccolo pezzo di spiaggia.
I bagni e le docce sono puliti, spaziosi, moderni e funzionanti.

We visited the Mooloolaba Beach Holiday Park for 16 nights and were allocated a great corner van site on the southern side of the entrance. Note; no cabins there.

The park was refurbished not so long ago and was recommended by a neighbour, so we decided it was time to try it out.

Facilities are well designed  and maintained and each site has a good concrete slab. The location is terrific; close to the beach, patrolled swimming, the Mooloolaba Surf Life Saving Club, a good cluster of shops, cafes and restaurants, some with nice sea views. There is a Coles supermarket within a comfortable walking distance if you want to combine walks and light grocery shopping.

On some evenings, cafes provide local entertainment, adding a nice atmosphere to dining out. One evening, we discovered the Sunset Markets (5-9pm 1st and 3rd Saturdays each month). There are some great food stands and a mix of other temptations, including vinyl records.

So, all up, we had a pleasant holiday with few car trips.

**Mooloolabah Beach, Sunshine Coast - A Slice of Paradise!**

Mooloolabah Beach is an absolute gem on the Sunshine Coast! The golden sands, crystal-clear waters, and gentle waves make it the perfect spot for both relaxation and adventure. Whether you're into swimming, surfing, or simply soaking up the sun, this beach has it all.

The beachside promenade is lined with charming cafes and restaurants where you can enjoy a delicious meal with an unbeatable ocean view. Plus, there's a lively atmosphere that's perfect for families, couples, and solo travelers alike.

The sunsets here are nothing short of magical, painting the sky with hues of pink, orange, and purple. It's the ideal way to end a perfect day at the beach.

I highly recommend Mooloolabah Beach for anyone visiting the Sunshine Coast. It's a little slice of paradise that will leave you with lasting memories.

MOOLOOLABA BEACH - MUST SEE

Mooloolaba Beach is a beautiful and popular beach located in Mooloolaba, Queensland, Australia. It is renowned for its golden sand, crystal-clear waters, and vibrant atmosphere. Here's some information about Mooloolaba Beach:

Location: Mooloolaba Beach is situated on the Sunshine Coast of Queensland, approximately 100 kilometers north of Brisbane. It is centrally located within the town of Mooloolaba, making it easily accessible to locals and tourists alike.

Beach Features: Mooloolaba Beach offers a wide, sandy shoreline that stretches for approximately 1.7 kilometers. The beach is relatively sheltered, providing calm waters that are suitable for swimming and water activities.

Surfing: While Mooloolaba Beach is generally known for its calm waters, there are occasions when waves are suitable for surfing, especially during periods of increased swell. The beach can be an ideal spot for beginners or those looking for gentler waves.

Lifeguard Patrols: Mooloolaba Beach is patrolled by lifeguards from Surf Life Saving Queensland. The lifeguards ensure the safety of beachgoers, provide assistance when needed, and indicate the safest areas for swimming. It's important to swim between the red and yellow flags that mark the designated swimming area.

Esplanade: The beach is backed by a vibrant and bustling esplanade that runs parallel to the shoreline. The esplanade is lined with a variety of cafes, restaurants, shops, and accommodations, offering a range of dining and entertainment options for visitors.

Sea Life Sunshine Coast: Located near Mooloolaba Beach is the Sea Life Sunshine Coast (formerly known as Underwater World), an aquarium and marine park that showcases a variety of marine creatures. It provides an opportunity to explore the underwater world and learn about the diverse marine life found in the region.

Water Activities: Mooloolaba Beach offers various water activities for visitors to enjoy. These can include stand-up paddleboarding, kayaking, jet skiing, and parasailing. Equipment rental and guided tours are available from operators along the beachfront.

Events and Festivals: Throughout the year, Mooloolaba Beach hosts a range of events and festivals. These can include beach volleyball tournaments, surf competitions, music festivals, and other cultural or sporting events. Check the local events calendar to see if any events coincide with your visit.

Mooloolaba Beach is a popular destination for locals and tourists alike, offering a picturesque setting, a range of amenities, and a vibrant atmosphere. Whether you're looking to relax on the sand, swim in the clear waters, enjoy water activities, or explore the surrounding area, Mooloolaba Beach provides a wonderful coastal experience on the Sunshine Coast.
